tasks.subject: Task 1: DB Migration â€” fi-auto-collect schema
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `last_fi_check` column to `users` and create `fi_saved_invoices` tracking table.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/migrations/006-fi-auto-collect.sql`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `users` table has a nullable `last_fi_check TIMESTAMPTZ` column
- [ ] `fi_saved_invoices` table exists with `iws_id` as primary key, `saved_at`, and `fs_node_id`
- [ ] Migration is idempotent (`IF NOT EXISTS` / column guard)

**Verify:** `psql $DATABASE_URL -f doodoo/migrations/006-fi-auto-collect.sql` twice without error â†’ `\d users` shows `last_fi_check`, `\dt fi_saved_invoices` shows the table.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/migrations/006-fi-auto-collect.sql"], "verifyCommand": "psql $DATABASE_URL -f doodoo/migrations/006-fi-auto-collect.sql", "acceptanceCriteria": ["users table has last_fi_check TIMESTAMPTZ column", "fi_saved_invoices table exists with iws_id PK", "Migration is idempotent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Types â€” FiDiscoveredOrder + FiAutoCollectJob
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend `fi.types.ts` with `FiDiscoveredOrder` and `FiAutoCollectJob` interfaces.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi.types.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `FiDiscoveredOrder` has `iwsId: string` and `numericOrderId: string`
- [ ] `FiAutoCollectJob` has `status`, `message`, `newCount?`, `error?`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi.types.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FiDiscoveredOrder interface exists with iwsId and numericOrderId", "FiAutoCollectJob interface exists with status/message/newCount/error", "TypeScript compiles without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Scraper â€” order list discovery
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `scrapeOrderList()` to `FashionIndexScraper` â€” logs into FI, reads the order list page, returns unique `FiDiscoveredOrder[]`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns only rows where `iwsId` is non-empty and not `'-'`
- [ ] Results are deduplicated by `iwsId`
- [ ] Numeric order ID extracted from `href` via `/\/order\/(\d+)/`
- [ ] Unit test: 3 rows, 2 share same IWS ID â†’ result has 2 entries
- [ ] Unit test: rows with `iwsId === '-'` excluded

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx jest fashion-index.scraper --testNamePattern="scrapeOrderList" --no-coverage` â†’ all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts", "doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest fashion-index.scraper --testNamePattern=scrapeOrderList --no-coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scrapeOrderList returns FiDiscoveredOrder[]", "Deduplicates by iwsId", "Skips rows with no IWS ID", "Unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Scraper â€” download invoice PDFs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `downloadInvoicePdfs(orders)` to `FashionIndexScraper` â€” logs into FI once, navigates to each `/order/{numericId}/invoice`, captures as PDF via `page.pdf()`, returns `Map<iwsId, Buffer>`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Single browser session for all downloads
- [ ] Returns `Map<string, Buffer>` keyed by `iwsId`
- [ ] If `page.pdf()` throws, logs warning and continues
- [ ] Unit test: mock `page.pdf()` returns buffer â†’ map has entry
- [ ] Unit test: first fails â†’ absent from map, second succeeds â†’ present

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx jest fashion-index.scraper --testNamePattern="downloadInvoicePdfs" --no-coverage` â†’ all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts", "doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest fashion-index.scraper --testNamePattern=downloadInvoicePdfs --no-coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["downloadInvoicePdfs returns Map<iwsId, Buffer>", "Failed PDF download is skipped, not thrown", "Unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: FiAutoCollectService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Implement `FiAutoCollectService` â€” orchestrates daily collect pipeline as a background job, persists to `fi_saved_invoices`, saves PDFs via `FsService`.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.service.ts`
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.service.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `startCollect(userId)` returns job ID synchronously
- [ ] Skips IWS IDs already in `fi_saved_invoices`
- [ ] If no new IWS IDs, job reaches `done` with `newCount: 0` without calling `downloadInvoicePdfs`
- [ ] Finds "Fashion Index" creditor via `LOWER(name) LIKE '%fashion%'`
- [ ] Creates `YYYY-MM` folder if not present
- [ ] Inserts each saved invoice into `fi_saved_invoices`
- [ ] Job reaches `error` on unrecoverable exception
- [ ] All 4 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx jest fi-auto-collect.service --no-coverage` â†’ all pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.service.ts", "doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.service.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx jest fi-auto-collect.service --no-coverage", "acceptanceCriteria": ["startCollect returns job ID synchronously", "Skips already-saved IWS IDs", "Creates monthly folder if absent", "Job status reaches done or error", "Unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: NestJS wiring â€” module, controller, FsModule export
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire `FiAutoCollectService` and controller into NestJS; export `FsService` from `FsModule`.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.controller.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.module.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fs/fs.module.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `GET /api/fashion-index/collect/check-daily` triggers job if `last_fi_check` is not today, updates DB, returns `{ jobId }`
- [ ] `GET /api/fashion-index/collect/jobs/:jobId` returns job status
- [ ] `FsModule` exports `FsService` and `FsStorageService`
- [ ] `FashionIndexModule` imports `FsModule`
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` â†’ no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-auto-collect.controller.ts", "doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.module.ts", "doodoo/src/fs/fs.module.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit", "acceptanceCriteria": ["check-daily endpoint exists and triggers job", "jobs/:jobId endpoint returns status", "FsModule exports FsService", "TypeScript compiles without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Angular â€” FiCollectService + Creator banner
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `FiCollectService` and a dismissible status banner in the Creator component that polls the daily collect job on `ngOnInit`.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/fi-collect.service.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.html`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.scss`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `checkDaily()` calls `GET /api/fashion-index/collect/check-daily`
- [ ] `ngOnInit` calls `checkDaily()` and starts polling if `jobId` non-null
- [ ] Banner shows: running / done-new / done-none / error states
- [ ] File tree refreshes when `done` and `newCount > 0`
- [ ] Banner is dismissible
- [ ] Polling interval cleared on component destroy
- [ ] Production build passes

**Verify:** `cd NxMonorepo/angular && npx nx build doodoo-fam --configuration=production` â†’ `âś” Building...` no errors.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/fi-collect.service.ts", "doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.ts", "doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.html", "doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/creator/creator.scss"], "verifyCommand": "cd NxMonorepo/angular && npx nx build doodoo-fam --configuration=production", "acceptanceCriteria": ["FiCollectService has checkDaily and getJobStatus methods", "Creator banner shows correct state per job status", "File tree refreshes on new files saved", "Banner dismissible", "OnDestroy clears polling interval", "Production build passes"]}
```
